# Snecko Oil

## Description

Draw 7 cards. Randomize the cost of cards in your Hand this turn.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Best as an emergency draw potion or burst-turn tool; random costs can make expensive hands playable but can also brick cheap hands, so use when the current hand is weak or survival/lethal needs a large redraw.
